info.title: BakktX - Crypto Exchange API
info.description:
## 🚀 Coming Soon

BakktX API documentation is currently being migrated to this platform. This institutional-grade crypto trading platform provides:

- **Spot Trading**: Market and limit orders for BTC, ETH, and other digital assets
- **Order Management**: Submit, track, and cancel orders with real-time updates
- **Position Tracking**: View crypto holdings and balances
- **Settlement & Custody**: Secure crypto deposits and withdrawals
- **Institutional Liquidity**: Access to deep liquidity pools and competitive pricing

### Current Documentation

While we complete the migration, the full BakktX API documentation is available at:

**[https://bakkt.readme.io/reference/submitorder](https://bakkt.readme.io/reference/submitorder)**

### Key Features

- High-volume institutional trading
- Sub-second order execution
- 99.9% uptime SLA
- Comprehensive KYB workflows
- White-label exchange capabilities

### Getting Started

For access to BakktX:

- **Sales & Onboarding**: sales@bakkt.com
- **Technical Support**: api-support@bakkt.com
- **Current API Docs**: [bakkt.readme.io](https://bakkt.readme.io)

### Migration Timeline

Complete API reference documentation will be available on this platform in **Q1 2025**.

Stay tuned for updates! 🚀
